headline: 1 Mid-Cap Stock on Our Buy List and 2 That Underwhelm
summary: Mid-cap stocks often strike the right balance between having proven business models and market opportunities that can support $100 billion corporations. However, they face intense competition from scaled industry giants and can be disrupted by new innovative players vying for a slice of the pie.

headline: Jim Cramer on Fortive: “It’s Nothing Special, Frankly”
summary: Fortive Corporation (NYSE:FTV) was among the stocks Jim Cramer highlighted during Mad Money, as he noted the rotation into defensive sectors. Cramer said that the stock’s rally caught him by surprise, as he remarked: Fifth is one you may not know, Fortive.
